name: @techbuddy/api
description: TechBuddy backend — Fastify, Anthropic SDK. All Claude calls live here.

scripts.// typecheck: prisma generate populates node_modules/.prisma/client/index.d.ts which exports User/UserRole/MessageRole/etc. TypeScript can't resolve those imports without it, even though the @prisma/client package itself is installed. Keep both steps in this script so CI (and any other caller) gets a self-contained typecheck.
